_comment: Placeholder ComfyUI workflow for Stable Diffusion / Flux + IP-Adapter scene image generation (anime mode). Export your SD + IP-Adapter (or InstantID) workflow from ComfyUI in API format and replace this file. Update input_mappings in config/comfyui.anime.json so node ids match: positive_prompt, negative_prompt, reference_image (IP-Adapter image loader), and seed (KSampler). The client uploads the character ref image for IP-Adapter and reads the first image output from /history.
